About Lakecia · Variant 12

Lakecia brings the receipts—and the warmth.

Her story holds serious technology leadership and a deep commitment to making sure more women feel equipped in rooms that shape the future.

Get to know the human behind the expertise.

A career of first-hand experience

Lakecia Gunter is a former CTO at Microsoft, former Chief of Staff to the CEO at Intel, and former Digital Logic Designer for the U.S. Department of Defense. She has 25 years of experience and has influenced platforms valued at more than $1B.

A wider responsibility

As an Independent Director at IDEX Corporation and Co-Founding Advisor to TechArena.ai, she sees how AI decisions affect workers, customers, investors, communities, and the women asked to lead through change.

Why this feels different

Lakecia’s work is not about making leaders feel small so consulting feels valuable. It is about helping women hear themselves think, ask better questions, and move with supported confidence.

Top 50

Black Business Women in the U.S.

ROAR

Podcast host centering women’s voices.

Family first

Complimentary priority for family-to-client support.

Emotional safety for women learning and leading through AI.

Get to know the human behind the expertise.
